Worksheet #2 - Zig vs. Zag - Dare to be Different
Then look at your list. Consider each person carefully. Rate the person along the scale
of conformity, with a 1 being the ultimate conformist and a 10 being the connumate
rebel.
Did the people on your list lead a life of expectation and conformity, or did they blaze
new trails, take great risks, step outside their comfort zones, and zig when others zag?
I suspect most, if not all, of the names on your lean toward the rebel side of the
ledger.
Most, and probably all, were zaggers.
If the people who you admire most were zaggers, why not you?
Try this:
Make a list of 10 people, living or dead, who you admire. The list could include
friends, colleagues, courageous explorers, famous scientists, clergy members, test
pilots, New England Patriots, entrepreneurs…
Take some time. List more than 10 if you’d like.
